ORDER ON RQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS:THE REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS GRANTED.A HEARING ON THIS MATTER IS SCHEDULED FOR:JULY 21, 2026.ANY PARTY WISHING TO BE HEARD MUST APPEAR AT THE SCHEDULED HEARING.THE RESPONDENT (DEFENDANT) IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE ALL EVIDENCE TO THE PLAINTIFF. SUCH EVIDENCE MUST BE SERVED BY MAIL OR PERSONAL DELIVERY UPON REQUEST BY THE PLAINTIFF.THE RESPONDENT SHALL PROVIDE THE REQUESTED EVIDENCE NO LATER THAN THREE (3) DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, ANGELICA-LORRAINE C IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VISA INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-17-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-17-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN M TRUE III; PLAINTIFF ANGELICA-LORRAINE C LEE IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM VIDEO CONFERENCE. DEFENDANT VISA INC. IS PRESENT, APPEARING JO-ANN QUINTANA, SR. DIRECTOR. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN M TRUE III; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2026 - JUDGMENT.

ORDER ON RQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS:THE REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS GRANTED.A HEARING ON THIS MATTER IS SCHEDULED FOR:JULY 21, 2026.ANY PARTY WISHING TO BE HEARD MUST APPEAR AT THE SCHEDULED HEARING.THE RESPONDENT (DEFENDANT) IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE ALL EVIDENCE TO THE PLAINTIFF. SUCH EVIDENCE MUST BE SERVED BY MAIL OR PERSONAL DELIVERY UPON REQUEST BY THE PLAINTIFF.THE RESPONDENT SHALL PROVIDE THE REQUESTED EVIDENCE NO LATER THAN THREE (3) DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, ANGELICA-LORRAINE C IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VISA INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
